label: 第243話
source_locator: 単行本27巻 目次 p.129
summary_short: 髙羽と羂索は漫才コンビとして舞台に立ち、髙羽は満足して術式を終える。その直後、隙を待っていた乙骨が羂索の首を斬り落とすが、羂索は自分の意思が受け継がれると告げる。
summary_full: 髙羽と羂索は漫才コンビとして舞台に立ち、髙羽は満足して術式を終える。その直後、隙を待っていた乙骨が羂索の首を斬り落とすが、羂索は自分の意思が受け継がれると告げる。二人は正式な漫才コンビとして舞台を完走し、髙羽は満足して白装束で横たわる。術式が解けた瞬間を狙い、乙骨が羂索の首を斬る。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: The battle in the Lake Gosho Colony takes an entertaining turn. 高羽 and 羂索 take the stage as a powerhouse comedy duo. However, all great performances must come to an end.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 羂索 introduces their comedy duo as "Pinchan". 内部 an imaginary scenario created by 高羽's technique, 超人 , he and 羂索 walk on stage to begin their routine as a comedy duo. After greeting the audience and briefly bantering, 羂索 introduces them as Pinchan ( ピンチャン , Pinchan ) . They start their performance when 高羽 asks if 羂索 knows the tale of Momotarō , to which the latter responds that he doesn't. 高羽 doubts that claim, as all parents tell that story to their children. 羂索 tearfully reveals that he was raised by a single mother who was always busy. After 高羽 apologizes for his insensitivity, 羂索 reveals that his mother loved him nonetheless and always read him stories, such as Momotarō . Angry, 高羽 asks him why he lied earlier, to which he reveals that he always wanted attention due to his busy mother. 高羽 calls out 羂索 for his harsh mood, citing him clicking his tongue earlier during their banter, which 羂索 denies happening after clicking his tongue again. 羂索 argues with 高羽, asking him what his problem is. 高羽 claims he is mood-sensitive, so he tried defusing the tension by retelling old stories. 羂索 responds by saying he is too dumb to understand that and asks if 高羽 would prefer a dog, a monkey, and a pheasant for friends instead. When 高羽 explains that he was using pillow words and didn't mean it literally, 羂索 repeats his statement that he is too dumb to understand literary conventions. 羂索 wonders if Momotarō was born from the old couple after they ate the magic peach and were rejuvenated, rather than being born from the peach itself. 高羽 is surprised by the vulgar theory but agrees that it is plausible. 高羽 realizing the performance must come to an end. The duo perform a skit, with 羂索 acting as Momotarō and 高羽 as his grandmother. 羂索 bids 高羽 farewell as he leaves to fight demons, but 高羽 stops him and tries to give him millet dumplings before he leaves. When 羂索 refuses due to disliking food made by hand, 高羽 angrily demands he take them. Noticing how good the dumplings look, 羂索 passive-aggressively thanks his "grandmother" for spending a lot of time making them due to living easily on a pension paid for by the younger generation. He expresses his joy for not having to see his "grandmother" anymore and insults her age as he leaves, but not before wishing her longevity. 高羽, initially angered by his insult, immediately forgives him due to his final comment, remarking on the strangeness of the Japanese language. 羂索 acts out the scene in the folk tale where Momotarō encounters a dog, noting that it is a Golden Retriever . 高羽 asks 羂索 to change the dog to a Japanese breed, otherwise it would be too jarring for the audience. 羂索 eats the dumplings, commenting on their deliciousness and how they can win a gold prize. 高羽 notes how every fried chicken joint wins that, and it would be surprising to find one that hasn't. 羂索 asks if it is ok to feed a dog millet dumpling and 高羽 replies that it's too late for realism at this point. Believing that the dumplings may have onions, which are poisonous to dogs, 羂索 decides to go through with it. 羂索 acts as if he finds a phone number on the dog's collar and calls its owner. He chats with the owner and reveals that the dog is a Labrador , much to 高羽's chagrin. Finishing the call, 羂索 says that the owner lives in Nerima , which is a 30-minute walk away, and prepares to return the dog. When 高羽 asks about his initial plans to fight demons, 羂索 decides to call the Demon Island to cancel his reservation. When looking up the location's phone number, he notes how it is rated 2.1 stars on Tabelog . "You cracked me up!" . Upon hearing he needs to pay a cancellation fee, 羂索 decides to send the monkey and pheasant to attack the Demon Island. 高羽 stops him, advising him that the monkey and pheasant will definitely lose. 羂索 notes that the pheasant has air supremacy, though 高羽 retorts that the pheasant can do nothing in the air but defecate on the demons, leading 羂索 to exclaim how awesome "poop bombs" are. 羂索 ponders whether he should return the dog, who he named "John", to its owner or spare the monkey and pheasant's lives. 高羽 chimes in that the latter choice is the obvious answer. 羂索 announces that he is disposing of the pheasant, and when asked why by 高羽, he answers that it is to appease the dog's owner, in the form of a pun. Abruptly, 羂索 asks 高羽 if something is wrong. 高羽, who realizes that his dream performance is about to end, expresses his wish to continue the performance and begins to cry. 羂索 tells him not to cry, as it will kill the mood. As 高羽 pats his partner on the chest, he says that's enough and the imaginary scenario ends. Back in the forest of the Lake Gosho Colony, 羂索 looks over 高羽, who is lying on the ground dressed like a corpse. 高羽 thanks 羂索 for performing with him, who in turn commends 高羽 for his performance. 羂索 smiles and tells 高羽 he was hilarious on stage. 憂太 ambushes 羂索 and decapitates him. Suddenly, 乙骨憂太 appears behind 羂索. The 呪詛師 senses an enemy behind him and attempts to activate the Cursed technique reversal of 反重力機構 . However, a strange noise causes them to swap places, keeping 憂太 behind 羂索. 憂太 decapitates 羂索 with a single swing of his katana, leaving the ancient sorcerer confused. He doesn't understand why he didn't notice 憂太's immense 呪力 sooner until he realizes 高羽's scenario wouldn't allow for anyone to interrupt the show. 羂索 is still alive despite having his head cut off. He asks if this was the jujutsu sorcerers ' plan all along. 憂太 confirms and states he had to finish the job because 高羽 wouldn't kill anyone. Despite voicing regret for his unfinished business, 羂索 ominously declares that his "will" shall be inherited.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 羂索 高羽史彦 乙骨憂太
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 高羽史彦 vs. 羂索 (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 高羽史彦の術式 超人 羂索の術式 反重力機構

key_events_verified_phase11: 髙羽と羂索は漫才コンビとして舞台に立ち、髙羽は満足して術式を終える。
その直後、隙を待っていた乙骨が羂索の首を斬り落とすが、羂索は自分の意思が受け継がれると告げる。
二人は正式な漫才コンビとして舞台を完走し、髙羽は満足して白装束で横たわる。
術式が解けた瞬間を狙い、乙骨が羂索の首を斬る。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
